title: eryngium sellowii
intro: Eryngium sellowii, also known as Sello's eryngium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium sellowii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Eryngium sellowii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
